name: nominex-hq
description: Nominex skill directory — plugins and standalone skills for agent teams

plugins.name: pmm
plugins.description: By Monday, you're re-explaining choices you made on Thursday. PMM fixes that. Every session, Claude loads what it already knows, then adds to it. Structured flat files, git-backed. No database, no setup. Decisions tracked with rationale, not just what but why. git log is your memory audit trail. Memory that compounds, not rots.
